Quests.name: A new journey
Quests.shortDesc: Welcome to Arngor, traveler. Do you seek to enter our great kingdom? If so, please report for duty at Lord Rorin's chamber.
Quests.longDesc: Entering Arngor is currently restricted to trusted people only. Destructive turmoil has ensnared our great kingdom. We do not seek to increase this instability by feeding our enemies more allies. Prove yourself and you will be allowed safe passage. Seek out Lord Rorin in the local inn, he will get you started.

Quests.name: Wolf Pelts
Quests.shortDesc: I really need some more leather scraps for my workshop. Care to help me out?
Quests.longDesc: I require 10 wolf pelts. Yeah, you heard right - Wolves. You'll find them outside the castle roaming the forest. Be careful- they're viciously hungry...

Quests.name: Report for duty
Quests.shortDesc: You seem like you're a capable fella. If you want to enter our kingdom, you'll have to earn your keep! Report for duty at the bridge, and find Commander Felix.
Quests.longDesc: I hope you aren't too rusty with weapons - you've got to get your hands dirty, son. Meet up with Felix at the bridge - he'll give you further instructions!

Quests.name: Explore the camp
Quests.shortDesc: I bet you're eager to start? As you can see, we've set up a perimeter here. A bunch of smugglers have overrun this part of the land, and we don't have enough soldiers stationed here. You'll have to go check it out for us.
Quests.longDesc: This right here is a product of the growing turmoil in our kingdom. These smugglers are mining the excavation point. The cave can supply them with everything from weapons to magical artifacts, which is just what the enemy wants. This has to end - they're bringing the enemy closer to our very doorstep...

Quests.name: Strike the camp
Quests.shortDesc: Awful, just awful... We have to free the slaves, but first we need to lower the number of mercenaries. Kill a few of the scumbags.
Quests.longDesc: Slay 10 smugglers. Watch out for their commanding officers - they may be too strong for you.

Quests.name: Liberate the slaves
Quests.shortDesc: Great work so far! Now it is time for you to liberate the slaves. Time is of the essence!
Quests.longDesc: Rescue 5 slaves, and bring them back home safely!

Quests.name: A final assault
Quests.shortDesc: It's time, young traveler. Your greatest challenge lies before you. Gather some friends and take on the commanding officers. Crush the smugglers once and for all!
Quests.longDesc: Neutralize the three commanding officers. One is located at the main camp, another is located in the cave, and the last one can be found in the building just at the right from the bridge.

Quests.name: A new allegiance
Quests.shortDesc: Outstanding, the smugglers have finally been crushed! Report back to Rorin, he will be most pleased.
Quests.longDesc: Rorin will reward you for your great bravery, traveler. Choose wisely! Best of luck, tread safely.

Quests.name: Food supplies
Quests.shortDesc: Howdy stranger! Mind helping me out? I'm in dire need of certain supplies. I know that those damn smugglers have lots of supplies. Care to fetch me some?
Quests.longDesc: Fetch 6 supply bags from the smuggler camp and surrounding areas. Be careful - the smugglers will not be happy!

Quests.name: Wolf meat
Quests.shortDesc: These damn wolves are everywhere! I need them gone - my farm is getting attacked regularly by those beasts. Slay some and fetch me their meat!
Quests.longDesc: Fetch 10 pieces of wolf meat. The wolves can be found all over the island.

Quests.name: Potion Brewing
Quests.shortDesc: Greetings traveler. Would you mind helping us out? We need certain ingredients to brew important potions.
Quests.longDesc: The Chantry appreciates your help. Please fetch 5 pumpkins and 3 mushrooms. You can find these items in the forest. Watch out for the wolves, though. May the lord watch over you.

Quests.name: Regular Assault
Quests.shortDesc: Felix told me you're good at getting your hands dirty. Unfortunately, the smugglers haven't abandoned the site just yet. We'll have to press harder and more regularly. Up for some action?
Quests.longDesc: Kill some smugglers and obtain their secret battle plans. The more we interfere, the greater the chance will be for us to put an end to them!

Quests.name: Logan's Secret
Quests.shortDesc: Please, would you mind fetching some personal belongings of mine? An important book is located in my room, in a house occupied by the smugglers.
Quests.longDesc: Go to the smuggler's camp, enter the building, and fetch my book in the room to the left.

Quests.name: Wolves at the gate I
Quests.shortDesc: Hello, traveler! These darn wolves keep coming out to the gate - would you mind taking care of them?
Quests.longDesc: Slay 10 young wolves. You can find wolves all around the island, although some are more dangerous than others.

Quests.name: Aron's Box
Quests.shortDesc: I have something important left behind at the building over at the smuggler's camp. Would you mind fetching a pristine box from my room?
Quests.longDesc: You can find the box in my room, at the right. Watch out for the smugglers - they aren't very fond of strangers...

Quests.name: Smuggler's Might
Quests.shortDesc: Hello again, traveler. Your services have been most useful! Yet, there is more to be done. A powerful legionnaire has arrived. Bring some friends and face this new foe! The smugglers shall be crushed once again.
Quests.longDesc: The smugglers are quite hesitant to deploy reinforcements. A legionnaire has been sent to scare us. We shall not tremble before these mercenaries. Bring some friends and face this new foe!

Quests.name: Foul Magic
Quests.shortDesc: Wretched creatures have infiltrated the catacombs. I dare you to fetch some bone fragments off of our dead.
Quests.longDesc: These bone fragments might come in handy. Perhaps we will be able to analyze the fragments in order to create an antidote against the foul magic used to turn our dead. Thirty fragments should be more than enough. However, fetching them won't be easy...

Quests.name: Saving Sergeant Harold
Quests.shortDesc: One of our sergeants have been missing for weeks. We suspect he might have been captured by the savages that reside in the catacombs.
Quests.longDesc: Sergeant Harold was sent to inspect the catacombs after months of suspicion that something had gone bad down there. Our priests didn't return when they should. Some of them were sick, and we couldn't risk letting them roam the outskirts freely so we threw them back into the catacombs for our own safety! We were desperate, you see, but now I fear things have escalated further... If you find Harold, be sure to rescue him at any cost!

objectives.objective: Escort Harold safely to the surface

Quests.name: Demonic Blood Samples
Quests.shortDesc: I believe we can make use of some blood samples off of the rats that reside in the catacombs. Would you care to help us out?
Quests.longDesc: The Chantry is interested in studying the blood vial of these vicious beasts. These are no ordinary rats. They have been cursed by the dark priestess, we're sure of it! Their blood could prove useful in our campaign against the dark forces that seek to destroy us. Fetch me a vial of any rat's blood, but while you're at it, neutralize all of them!

objectives.objective: Procure Vial of Demonic Rat Blood

Quests.name: The Evil Within
Quests.shortDesc: Young traveler, our greatest fear have come true! The island is no longer safe, our enemy has built an army right under our noses! We need you to neutralize this threat before it is too late!
Quests.longDesc: For years the Capital Outskirts have protected the lands of Arngor from invaders, pirates and such... But now, I fear this position will be lost if we don't deal with the intruders that reside in the now opened catacombs. You will have to bring some allies to defeat the evil within. May Lightfall be with you! Slay them all!

Quests.name: Moroes the Summoner
Quests.shortDesc: A great foe of the Chantry, he is apparently the master mind behind this unfortunate infiltration of our island. We need you to defeat Moroes and his commanders. Should you be successful, the dark priestess herself would be weakened! Are you up for the challenge?
Quests.longDesc: Moroes the Summoner, a powerful necromancer. Once an archmage of Lightfall itself. Treacherous thoughts plagued Moroes, and eventually he was recruited by the priestess herself. His knowledge of the dark arts has made him as feared as Keldroth himself. Slaying him won't be easy, but if you bring enough people you should be able to put him out of his misery.

Quests.name: Dangerous Supplies
Quests.shortDesc: We need your help to acquire further fragments from the catacombs! The Chantry wishes to study the materials further, and is in need of more supplies.
Quests.longDesc: The fragments you fetched for Rorin earlier has proven most useful, yet we are in need of more! We believe that these fragments may aid us in our battle against the dark priestess.  You see, with these fragments we can create armor and potions that will help us defeat the cursed creatures more effectively.

Quests.name: Wolves at the gate II
Quests.shortDesc: There's yet more to be done! These wolves are even more vicious, would you mind?
Quests.longDesc: Slay 10 more wolves, focus on the elder ones this time. They're much more aggressive, be careful.

Quests.name: Wolves at the gate III
Quests.shortDesc: I'm afraid I'll need your assistance with wolves yet again, would you be so kind?
Quests.longDesc: This time around I'll need even more assistance, the so called 'Magnificent' wolf brethren can be found at a few various locations around the island. Slay and fetch the pelt off of one!

Quests.name: A Restless Evil
Quests.shortDesc: Deep within the Outskirts Catacombs rests an evil within, this evil can only be summoned from a book lying near the altar.
Quests.longDesc: The infamous necromancer Moroes the Summoner brought with him an infestation of evil in the catacombs at the Capital Outskirts. Vanquishing Moroes and his commanders will not be enough. There is a book with magnificent magical power lying on an altar within the catacombs, read from it and you should summon its magical powers.

Quests.name: Securing the perimeter
Quests.shortDesc: We have to neutralize the countless bandits roaming the country side.
Quests.longDesc: Lots of bandits have settled outside the city, and the villagers are not liking it one bit! Regular riots are driving our resources thin, please defeat these mongrels for us.

Quests.name: Wolf Menace
Quests.shortDesc: Our cattle is at continuous risk due to these darn wolves, we need you to reduce their numbers.
Quests.longDesc: Wolves are very common in this region of the Kingdom, however their numbers are staggering high. Our animals are not safe, especially our cattle is at risk! The wolves are destroying our most vital sources of food. We do not want to lead our people to starvation!

Quests.name: Torch the Camp
Quests.shortDesc: Try to smoke out the bandits by burning down their tents, this should teach them a severe lesson. To stay out of our territory!
Quests.longDesc: Use a torch to fire up the various bandit tents stationed around Lightfall, just don't burn up anything inside the city though. That'd cost ya.

Quests.name: Spider Menace
Quests.shortDesc: The Lightfall caves were popular for mining, but unfortunately no more... A large infestation of spiders have prevented us from efficiently using the tunnels!
Quests.longDesc: A large infestation of spiders have been plaguing the city for a long time, few are willing to risk their lives mining for minerals. We need these minerals for our local blacksmith, otherwise how will we craft armor and weapons?

Quests.name: Bandit Massacre
Quests.shortDesc: The High King demands swift action, bandits are overrunning the region! Bring me their heads, show no mercy!
Quests.longDesc: Slaughter these bandits in the name of the king! Bring me their heads so we can put them on pikes for the others to see, we are not to be trifled with.

Quests.name: Bandit Supplies
Quests.shortDesc: Our local mining tunnels are overrun by spiders, so we have to get our crafting materials from the bandits. Fetch me some of their armor, weapons and what not.
Quests.longDesc: These bandits are significantly geared, as if they were blades for hire! We need more crafting materials, the local mining tunnel is not safe for labor at this time. Therefore we want you to obtain armor scraps from bandits that you may kill.

Quests.name: Bandit Intel
Quests.shortDesc: We want you to find out what these bandits are really up to. Who sent them? What are they doing here?
Quests.longDesc: Bandits have plagued Lightfall for quite some time now, we need to figure out why they are really here. Try to find some intel on them, they have two main camps, one near the entrance to Scorchridge and another deep in the nearby cave.

Quests.name: A New Dawn
Quests.shortDesc: We're happy to have you with us, your next journey awaits in Lightfall my friend. Bring this letter to the king.
Quests.longDesc: The High King has had plenty of trouble on his hands of late, extra hands to help out would be much appreciated. Speak to the boat master by the docks, he will take you to our great kingdom!

Quests.name: Supplies for Marcus Heinberg
Quests.shortDesc: Marcus Heinberg in Capital Outskirts is in need of some long awaited supplies, would you care to bring them to him?
Quests.longDesc: Marcus Heinberg is in need of some crafting material for the island's forces, we luckily have some spares.

Quests.name: Return to Henry Bloodthorn
Quests.shortDesc: Please return my payment to Henry himself, it's all there, don't worry!
Quests.longDesc: I've waited for these supplies for a long time, it's good to see that the mainland has not forgotten us completely. Bring Henry's payment to him, thanks.

Quests.name: Alarming News
Quests.shortDesc: We have some important information for Sergeant Harold, please deliver this letter to him.
Quests.longDesc: We might have some more clues regarding this mysterious magical barrier, Sergeant Harold would want to hear of this. He'll notify the king as well, if it is of enough importance of course.

Quests.name: Ancient Sorcery
Quests.shortDesc: We require some ingredients for some particularly powerful potions.
Quests.longDesc: Potions can be the difference between life and death, the Chantry values the use of potions above all. We need you to fetch the listed ingredients so that we can craft some more potions. You will be well compensated!

Quests.name: Chicken Escape!
Quests.shortDesc: My chicken is lost, I fear the bandits have snatched him for food! If you find my chicken, bring it back to the city, I beg you!
Quests.longDesc: My chicken got lost as we were returning to the castle, we were checking on the crops you see. The bandits were everywhere, so I ran all I could! You might need a key to rescue my chicken, any of the bandits could have the key!

Quests.name: Vicious Rebels
Quests.shortDesc: Angry villagers are attacking the city regularly, if you encounter any of these rebels we'd like if you'd defend the city with us!
Quests.longDesc: The increasing tension between Lightfall and the rest of Arngor is taking its toll on local tradesmen, businessmen, farmers and what not! Sadly some have turned to violence, and it must stop!

Quests.name: Guild Imposters
Quests.shortDesc: Nowadays there are far too many blades for hire, the bandits roaming the countryside are not honorable! They either join our cause, or perish! Bring me their heads, and the guild will be most grateful!
Quests.longDesc: Bandit imposters are many, we as a guild strive to build a solid and feared presence in the kingdom of Arngor. We always accept in new members, but these lone wolves will have to be dealt with. They either join the guild, or find some other field of work! We've given them enough chances as is, bring me their heads!

Quests.name: Purge the Filth
Quests.shortDesc: Our city sewers have been infested by rats, why don't you make yourself useful and do something about it?
Quests.longDesc: The city sewers are flooded with these damn rats, and they are pretty big too! You need a properly sharpened blade to put them down for sure. Just don't catch any diseases, otherwise you'll experience my bad side.

Quests.name: Corrupted Spider Venom
Quests.shortDesc: Hail, The Chantry requires your aid in obtaining corrupted spider venom, perhaps with this substance we can finally produce a potion strong enough to weaken our foes.
Quests.longDesc: Spiders found in the Cavern of Torment have been corrupted by Mol'Baragh, perhaps we can use this to our advantage? Try to extract some of the spider's venom, it would be great research for us!

Quests.name: The Power of Chaos
Quests.shortDesc: Mol'Baragh's and his minions are drawing their power through an essence of chaotic energy, please help us retrieve these essences!
Quests.longDesc: Essence of Chaos, a forbidden source of power is being used by the dark priestess to enhance her army! It seems like the crystals of power in the cave are being used to create this powerful essence. Please retrieve a sample for us, we have to know what we are up against!

Quests.name: More Essences of Chaos
Quests.shortDesc: These essences seem very useful to us, would you mind fetching us another one?
Quests.longDesc: We wish to increase our supply of these powerful essences, perhaps we can use them to break the magical barrier preventing us from venturing to Scorchridge!

Quests.name: A Returning Evil
Quests.shortDesc: Mol'Baragh has found refuge deep in the mines of Lightfall, we need you to vanquish this evil at once!
Quests.longDesc: Our mines have unfortunately been infiltrated by a major benefactor of the dark priestess, Mol'Baragh, who seek to extract powerful artifacts from our mine. We believe it is only a matter of time before he fulfill his goal, thus it is crucial that you neutralize him and his minions immediately!

Quests.name: Purging the Tormented
Quests.shortDesc: We require your aid to vanquish Mol'Baragh's tormentors, these lost souls have my permission to die.
Quests.longDesc: Mol'Baragh has gained a large following in our lands, people I would once call my countrymen have turned to the temptation of unimaginable power, we are obliged to bring them to justice, and we will, with no mercy!

Quests.name: Blood Brothers
Quests.shortDesc: Victus - my oldest brother has eluded me for the last time! This time I cannot forgive his actions, will you help me?
Quests.longDesc: Rumors have been spreading that my lost brother Victus has been running vile business in the nearby mines. He has dishonored the entire guild, citizens of Lightfall have been submitted to a malice I yet have to understand!   Please, help me bring him to justice - thus restoring our honor! I will be in your debt, traveler.

Quests.name: Blood Oath - Victus
Quests.shortDesc: Aye, traveler, my brother's demise was inevitable... I would like to repay your service by crafting his armor for you - thus a small fragment of his soul would live on.
Quests.longDesc: Victus was a revered armorer, crafting his magnificent armor will require several items - my colleague will assemble the armor for you when you retrieve the necessary pieces. As for the chest piece, you will have to prove your full allegiance to obtain it.

Quests.name: Malicious Sorcery
Quests.shortDesc: You will have to strengthen yourself, if you provide us with certain items you might just stand a chance. Are you interested?
Quests.longDesc: Venture to the Outskirts Catacombs and retrieve Moroes's dark essence, combine this with the ritualistic mask found within Cavern of Torment, finally infuse this with multiple essence of chaos. That should be enough to enhance the Magister's Hood further, you will have to prove your allegiance to us first, however, if you wish to obtain the hood.

Quests.name: Exchange Mantle of Protection
Quests.shortDesc: Would you like to exchange this cloak for another?
Quests.longDesc: You will need to provide me with an Essence of Chaos first!

Quests.name: Exchange Mantle of Wisdom
Quests.shortDesc: Would you like to exchange this cloak for another?
Quests.longDesc: You will need to provide me with an Essence of Chaos first!

Quests.name: Exchange Mantle of Dexterity
Quests.shortDesc: Would you like to exchange this cloak for another?
Quests.longDesc: You will need to provide me with an Essence of Chaos first!

Quests.name: Exchange Mantle of Strength
Quests.shortDesc: Would you like to exchange this cloak for another?
Quests.longDesc: You will need to provide me with an Essence of Chaos first!

Quests.name: Uncharted Territory I
Quests.shortDesc: The passage to Scorchridge has been opened, the king will want to hear of this.
Quests.longDesc: Lord Vael has reportedly been able to defuse the magical barrier which kept us away from Scorchridge, a small force is stationed at Tyrant's Refuge. Firstly, I will need you to report this to the king, he will be most pleased!

Quests.name: Uncharted Territory II
Quests.shortDesc: You've brought an important matter to my attention, you must report for duty at Tyrant's Refuge at once!
Quests.longDesc: Finally after all this strife we will be able to venture into Scorchridge again.. You may report for duty at Tyrant's Refuge, Lord Vael will need all the support he can get.

Quests.name: Valoren's Strife I
Quests.shortDesc: Scorchridge houses an ancient sanctuary that has recently been infiltrated by agents of Keldroth, will you bring aid to the remnants of this sacred order?
Quests.longDesc: Grimhold Sanctuary is the seat of power in this region, Keldroth's assault has caused a major crisis - countless refugees have been granted refuge in Ragefire Fortress, amongst them is Valoren the Holy - spiritual leader of Grimhold Sanctuary. He will tell you more of the challenges to come, seek him out to the north west.

Quests.name: Salvaging Relations
Quests.shortDesc: Venture to Ragefire Fortress and pledge yourself to Ragnar Ragefire, we'd best be on the ogres good side.
Quests.longDesc: At last the bloodfeud in Scorchridge has come to an end, and thus we must use the opportunity to salvage our relationship with the ogres. Ragnar Ragefire, chieftain of Ragefire Fortress would make a mighty ally, please do pledge your services to him and his kin.

Quests.name: A Humbled Chieftain
Quests.shortDesc: I'm most humbled at your request, human. We certainly have work that needs doing, Ognar Switfwind will fill you in on the details.
Quests.longDesc: Report to Ognar Switfwind, my commander-in-chief, he will brief you on certain pressing matters. That's all for now!

Quests.name: Valoren's Strife II
Quests.shortDesc: Your aid is very much appreciated, our first step will be to gain access to the sanctuary. Please speak to Darrius for further information on this matter.
Quests.longDesc: Our escape from Grimhold Sanctuary was risky and deadly, yet we made it.. However, Keldroth has cast a spell on the main gates, an arcane lock of sorts.. We must break this lock if we wish to succeed, Darrius will know more, he will brief you further.

Quests.name: Reclamation I
Quests.shortDesc: So you've heard of our strife, we desperately need to unlock the gates to our sanctuary - I believe we have some clues..
Quests.longDesc: Venture to the sanctuary entrance and obtain a soul essence from one of the myrmidons, I shall equip you with an artifact that will siphon soul essences from their corpses so that you may loot them. I suppose two essences will do, with these in hand I might be able to decipher the magic used to create the arcane lock.

Quests.name: Reclamation II
Quests.shortDesc: Seek out Thrain Ragefire, Ragnar Ragefire's older brother. His spiritual powers are strong, he may be able to help us.
Quests.longDesc: Now that we have the soul essences extracted we must ask Ragnar Ragefire's brother Thrain for assistance, his spiritual powers are much greater than ours.

Quests.name: Reclamation III
Quests.shortDesc: We need more information about Keldroth's operation, there is still a rogue agent left in the region, track it down and destroy it..
Quests.longDesc: If the rumors are true, an agent known as Kolissis has been overseeing the sacking of Grimhold.. But I am certain that he is not acting alone, you must track this agent down and destroy him! Every agent of Keldroth holds a codex that can be used to decipher their tomes, perhaps this agent has a tome nearby, if so, use its codex to learn anything useful.

Quests.name: Reclamation IV
Quests.shortDesc: Your spirit is strong stranger. Now that you have discovered the truth, you should share your findings with Darrius.
Quests.longDesc: Defeating the bone lord will not be an easy task, but first you must lure it out.. <Thrain examines the soul essence, as if he almost forgot to take it into account> Oh, as for the soul essence you brought me, tell Darrius to enchant it with their holy insignia - use its power to disrupt the acolytes in the crypt.

Quests.name: Reclamation V
Quests.shortDesc: Your intel has been most valuable to us, our next move will be to disrupt the summoning rituals in the crypt - this should lure the bone lord to us.
Quests.longDesc: The insight you have given us is most concerning, especially for our human brethren in Lightfall. We should make haste to stop this madness before it is too late. You will have to find a way to disrupt the summoners in the crypt, but be warned, the bone lord is extremely powerful, you'll need some serious aid to defeat him. I've blessed the soul essence you extracted earlier, cast this into the summoner's brazier - fingers crossed that this will disrupt the channeling.. When the bone lord is slain, the arcane lock on the gates should fade, but be weary - the sanctuary will not greet us with open arms..

Quests.name: Reclamation VI
Quests.shortDesc: Your efforts will never be forgotten, please share the good news with Valoren, friend.
Quests.longDesc: You did it! <Darrius tries to stay composed> ... We now have a fighting chance to reclaim our sanctuary, and it is all thanks to your efforts! A new chapter is ahead of us, together we will reclaim Grimhold!

Quests.name: Merciless Betrayal
Quests.shortDesc: Our sanctuary was betrayed by one of our own, now that we have regained access it is about time that justice is served, and in due cause!
Quests.longDesc: When Keldroth infiltrated our sanctuary they corrupted our worshippers minds, however, I believe one of our own aided Keldroth in this act, a sympathizer if you will... a sick one at that.. Vizariel, with reign from Dreadwood itself - and not to mention, a powerful mage.. His crime against us will not go without punishment, I grant you the power and rage to crush him, even mutilate him if you will.. <Valoren tries to compose himself amidst the anger> ..

Quests.name: Culling the Corrupted
Quests.shortDesc: Our beloved sanctuary has been left battered, I fear we must vanquish every last soul - Keldroth's corruption is too strong! I ask you to take this burden upon yourself.
Quests.longDesc: This cleansing will come at a cost, but unfortunately the minds of the corrupted are too far gone! <Darrius sighs> But we must reclaim our home at any cost!

Quests.name: Prison Break
Quests.shortDesc: When we fled the sanctuary many of our brothers were left behind, either to Keldroth's corruption or slain by his minions.. I've heard rumors that one of our loyal brothers has been held captive, we have to break him out!
Quests.longDesc: Our brother Maleki the Just has been held captive in the sanctuary, for reasons unknown.. We have to break him out of there! Deep inside the sanctum there are a few holding cells, I bet that is where he is being held.. But I'm certain it will be heavily guarded, and you will need a key from one of Keldroth's commanders.

Quests.name: Culling the Herd I
Quests.shortDesc: The boar population is getting out of hand, we need to prune it to prevent risk of spreading disease amongst the fauna.
Quests.longDesc: You may start with the younger ones first, they are not as fierce as the elder ones.

Quests.name: Culling the Herd II
Quests.shortDesc: The boar population is getting out of hand, we need to prune it to prevent risk of spreading disease amongst the fauna.
Quests.longDesc: This one will be a notch tougher, the elder boars are very protective of their young.

Quests.name: Boar Goulash
Quests.shortDesc: Oh how I hunger for some goulash, tell you what, fetch these ingredients and I'll reward you handsomely.
Quests.longDesc: A proper goulash needs a set of ingredients, our people find the flank and head to be most delicious.. <Gintharrias rubs his belly in excitement> ..

Quests.name: Magma Panic!
Quests.shortDesc: Magma scorpions are particularly unpleasant, and not to mention that they are a major threat to the rest of the fauna.. It wouldn't hurt to prune their population a little.
Quests.longDesc: Prune the scorpion population, you can find them in various locations, but please do ming their fiery sting! Invest in some resistance potions, if necessary. Good hunting!

Quests.name: Boar Flanks
Quests.shortDesc: Are you up for some more hunting? We always need more food supplies, and considering you did so well with the goulash!
Quests.longDesc: As we are growing in numbers we need more supplies, the boar population is thriving, and their meat is most delicious!

Quests.name: Bounty: Battlesnout
Quests.shortDesc: This beast cannot be tamed, Battlesnout is fierce and poses a threat to wanderers, perhaps this is something you can deal with?
Quests.longDesc: The drylands hold plenty of threats, even from the fauna! Gather a small hunting party and claim this beast's head.

Quests.name: Bounty: Firepoke
Quests.shortDesc: Imagine a giant magma scorpion, one with a sting so powerful it melts your flesh instantly! Their stingers are most valuable here, you will be rewarded handsomely.
Quests.longDesc: The magma scorpions fiery venom have been used as medicine by our people for generations, it can also be used to enchant our weapons to do significant fire damage.

Quests.name: The Roschas Menace I
Quests.shortDesc: Our mining operations came to a halt when the Roschas clan raided Scorchridge, they even intercept most of our supply runs, and it gets worse by the day! We need to learn more about their operation, and I do believe Marlow at Bloodstone Keep will be able to aid us in this. Could you bring this letter to him?
Quests.longDesc: Power shifted dramatically when the tribal bloodfeud ended, the Roschas clan took the opportunity to setup operations in our land - right under our noses! Unfortunately we know little of their operation, however, there might be someone at Bloodstone Keep willing to help us out. <Ognar hands you a letter> Deliver this to Marlow, he runs the Bloodstone Arena, and he has many watchful eyes on the nearby mining operations, surely he must suspect something..

Quests.name: The Roschas Menace II
Quests.shortDesc: I concur, the Roschas clan has become quite a menace, even to us, we rely on adventurers passing through - nowadays they usually end up dead on the way! We've scouted a spy running routine operations nearby, intercepting him might be the first step.
Quests.longDesc: We've scouted a spy on several occasions, he delivers important intel to the Roschas leader, I'm certain that the intel consist of heist locations, stolen goods, and what not.. Intercept the spy and steal his intel, from there we can plan our assault..

Quests.name: The Roschas Menace III
Quests.shortDesc: Their operation is far more advanced than I anticipated, share your findings with Ognar.
Quests.longDesc: Their operation is immense, very well organized indeed.. We should plan our next steps carefully, share your findings with Ognar.

Quests.name: Assault on Roschas Mine
Quests.shortDesc: This is most concerning, the Roschas clan can not be allowed to expand, the moment to strike is now!
Quests.longDesc: Eliminate some Roschas goons, perhaps this will send a clear enough message..

Quests.name: Missing Emissary I
Quests.shortDesc: We should inform Lord Vael that one of their officials have been captured by the Roschas clan.
Quests.longDesc: Your findings mention a prisoner held captive deep in the Roschas mines, he was kidnapped along the road from Tyrant's Refuge. Speak to Lord Vael, he will want to hear of this. <Ognar hands you the intelligence report>

Quests.name: Missing Emissary II
Quests.shortDesc: This report is most grim, Galaden has gone missing? King Gerrard dispatched an emissary to Ragefire Fortress recently, the Roschas must have intercepted him.. Liberate him at once!
Quests.longDesc: Galaden was sent to Ragefire Fortress to soothe our relationship with the ogres, I pray that he is still alive.. You have to venture deep into the Roschas mine, find Galaden and bring him safely to Ragefire Fortress.

Quests.name: Bounty: Lord Roschas IV
Quests.shortDesc: Defeat the Roschas leader, bring his family ring as proof of the deed.
Quests.longDesc: Lord Roschas IV is a powerful thug, you'll need to gather some brave souls to challenge him, I wish you best of luck!

Quests.name: Roschas Supplies
Quests.shortDesc: Several supplies have been seized by the Roschas clan, please help us recover as many as possible.
Quests.longDesc: The foul Roschas maggots have pillaged our resources for too long, reclaim our precious supplies, traveler.. We will be needing them to feed our kin, take care of our old and craft weapons.

Quests.name: Death to Roschas!
Quests.shortDesc: Those Roschas fools should've never come here, deal with them how you see fit... Just bring me their heads, the lot of them!
Quests.longDesc: Clan Roschas has been nothing but a pain in our arse, the one with an unforgiving itch.. Teach them a lesson, defile them, mutilate them, I don't care.. Bring me their filthy heads, so that I can put them to display on our walls..

Quests.name: Ruby!
Quests.shortDesc: I've heard rumors that the Roschas miners have been hard at work prospecting flawless gems! I'll give you a hefty cut if you can procure me some.
Quests.longDesc: A famous gem dealer needs the finest gems, my stock has grown quite dry as of late.. But this fine opportunity presented itself just in time! I need a few flawless rubies, shank some of the miners, I'm sure they will be swayed to share some of their valuables.. <Tarrlok smirks> ..

Quests.name: Bloodstone Initiation
Quests.shortDesc: If you wish to enter the arena, prove yourself.. I'm sure you'll find the initiation to be quite easy.
Quests.longDesc: After countless failed attempts by eager adventurers we finally implemented an initiation program.. Simply because the boss was tired of getting disappointed! <Marlow sweats and twitches in panic> So you'd better not screw this up!

Quests.name: Lost in Action
Quests.shortDesc: It has been several months since two of our kinsmen left our tribe, we have not heard a single word.. I assumed they would be moving to the city of Lightfall, but I'm not quite sure anymore.. If you happen to come across any information regarding Grogg and Brogg, please tell me.
Quests.longDesc: Our kinsmen Grogg and Brogg were talented warriors in their own right, I suppose they were not ready for the slow and peaceful life we could offer? After all, they fought fiercely during the tribal wars, our peace could not have been achieved without their blood and sweat. If you happen to come across them, or any information in your travels, please let me know.

Quests.name: Corruption of Keldroth I
Quests.shortDesc: You gently pickup the letter from the deceased peasant's hand, perhaps you can stop the evil that has been set in motion?
Quests.longDesc: A fierce war is approaching, one between the living and the dead..

Quests.name: Corruption of Keldroth II
Quests.shortDesc: If only we could have acted sooner, I fear the entirety of Dreadwood is lost... We have to stop the disease from getting any closer, vanquish the mindless ones!
Quests.longDesc: It has been many months since we last heard any news from our settlement in Dreadwood, I already feared the worst - and unfortunately it was so.. Yet, we must not despair, as long as there is light, there is hope. We shall take this matter to the high chantry, but for now reinforce the passage and neutralize the mindless ones.. Bring me their brains for analysis, perhaps there is something we can survey from them.

Quests.name: Stabilizing the Forge
Quests.shortDesc: Oh dear.. My forge is almost worn out again.. I need a constant supply of crimson roses to stabilize this ferocious magma.. Can you fetch some for me?
Quests.longDesc: Crimson Roses are very peculiar, grinding them into tiny pieces and sprinkling them onto the molten lava will stabilize it to the point where I can work so much more effectively..

Quests.name: Beetle Husks
Quests.shortDesc: Our great dryland beetles have an extremely strong husk, I find them very useful for our hardened leather armor, can you salvage some for me?
Quests.longDesc: Dryland beetles are docile, but they will not hesitate to put up a fight if threatened. Their husk can be used to craft very strong leather armor and shields. You can find them down in the valley, just outside the fortress.

Quests.name: Scarab Scales
Quests.shortDesc: I've heard rumors that Grimhold Sanctuary is home to a very rare scarab species, could you harvest some samples for me?
Quests.longDesc: This is most exciting! I'll be able to experiement with some hefty piece of armor with these scarab shells, I look forward to glance upon them.

Quests.name: Sharper, Faster, Stronger!
Quests.shortDesc: I'm running low on various supplies I use to craft improvised weapons, are you up for a challenge?
Quests.longDesc: Since I have to make do with local provisions, I tend to go with the scorpion claws and stingers.. They are very sharp and durable, obtaining them however, is quite a feat of strength..

Quests.name: Smolderstone's Lost Pick
Quests.shortDesc: I've managed to lose my precious pickaxe, I was being chased down - I panicked! Could you help me out?
Quests.longDesc: Remind me to not challenge a pack of scorpions when I go out in the field.. Clumsy as I can be, my favorite pickaxe was lost as I ran to safety.. It should hopefully still be where I left it, by the old abandoned mine.

Quests.name: Pepperoni Trouble
Quests.shortDesc: <Rodolth farts> Yes, Rodolth likes chicken, but Rodolth hate Doksfir, teach him a lesson.. <Rodolth shits himself> ... What? Rodolth has urgent business..
Quests.longDesc: This Doksfir guy <Rodolth sniffs some beetledust>, he thinks Rodolth stupid! He mock Rodolth, you teach him, Rodolth knows how to rattle his jimmies.. <Rodolth squeeks and leaks> ..

Quests.name: Rodolth's Diary
Quests.shortDesc: Rodolth was unfortunate enough to go for a stroll when the smelly ghouls invaded us.. Rodolth left in such a hurry, diary dropped! Find my diary, will you?
Quests.longDesc: Rodolth enjoys the quiet outdoors, but on this day it was anything but quiet! Rodolth run so fast, almost dead Rodolth was.. <Rodolth squeeks> Precious diary lost in all the tension.. Rodolth not warrior, how should Rodolth reclaim diary?! <Rodolth gazes at you with expectation> Bring it back, Rodolth needs his diary..

Quests.name: Pursuing Knowledge
Quests.shortDesc: Our mantra is to always seek knowledge, as power is induced from just that.. In Grimhold Sanctuary there is said to be a chalice that can bless one with eternal clairvoyance! Bring us this chalice and you'll be handsomely rewarded.
Quests.longDesc: Now, is there such a thing as eternal clairvoyance? Apparently so.. Confirmed by Valoren himself, it is one of many ancient relics deep inside the sanctum. With this blessing, perhaps we stand a fighting chance against the evil lurking on our doorstep.

Quests.name: Ger'Lash Traitors!
Quests.shortDesc: The treacherous Ger'Lash have struck a deal with agents of Keldroth, their actions have stained our very pride.. <Ognar slams his hands on the table> Ragefire has a duty - to unite ALL ogres, at ANY cost. Yet, betrayal has no redemption, thus they shall perish. This task is not for the faint of heart, young one.. Do you have the true strength of an ogre? If so, this is your call to battle.
Quests.longDesc: When the last blood feud ended, our tribes mostly united, the Ger'Lash <Ognar spits> decided to pursue other matters.. Rumor has it that they struck a bargain with Keldroth's agents, in return they would be granted unimaginable power.. Hah! <Ognar raises his fists> We will show them unimaginable power.. Ragefire shall crush them!

Quests.name: Bounty: Beastmaster
Quests.shortDesc: Trym, the treacherous leader of the Ger'Lash has gotten in dirty with Keldroth's scheming.. His betrayal will be paid in blood, what say you?
Quests.longDesc: Our united tribes put their faith in Ragnar, much to Tryms disapproval.. His thirst for power and bloodshed would not be so easily tamed.. He rallied his closest allies to form his own tribe, the Ger'Lash.. In my view they are nothing but mercenaries - and now doing Keldroth's bidding..

Quests.name: Vizariel's Atonement
Quests.shortDesc: I have brought great shame to our sanctuary - greed and power consumed my soul, and for that I will be judged. But before I pass on, I ask for a small mercy - a wish if you will.. Deliver this letter to Valoren, that is all I ask.
Quests.longDesc: There is much regret, but fate was not my friend in this hour.. I cannot give Valoren the closure he deserves, but I hope that some last passing words will be of worth.

Quests.name: Purification Rites I
Quests.shortDesc: Deep inside Grimhold Sanctuary there is a spring of holy water, I am very curious if a sample of their water can be used to cure the corruption of Keldroth.. If you plan to liberate the sanctum, would you mind fetching me a sample?
Quests.longDesc: I have faith that we may learn something useful from this sample, <Vael hands you a vial> use this empty vial to salvage some holy water from the spring of grace - located near the inner sanctum.

Quests.name: Purification Rites II
Quests.shortDesc: Let's see if my hypothesis is correct, give this captured noble a zip of the holy water and let's observe its effects..
Quests.longDesc: I cannot say for certain if this will work, but we have to give it a shot.. When you are ready, give a zip of the holy water to this captured noble.

objectives.objective: Test Holy Water on Captured Noble

Quests.name: Lost Knowledge
Quests.shortDesc: Our sanctuary is home to one of the greatest collections of knowledge in all of Arngor, I fear that much of this will be lost unless we salvage as much as we can - will you help?
Quests.longDesc: Keldroth's corruption does not only affect the living, it latches on to any physical matter! Our knowledge must persevere, for the good of Arngor!

Quests.name: Purification Rites III
Quests.shortDesc: Our efforts have not exactly been fruitful, considering our only hope suffocated on some holy liquid.. Gods.. If it was only that simple.. <Lord Vael pauses to think> But.. If we could pose as one of their own.. Oh yes! I shall dispatch you to Valoren, perhaps he can give you a disguise of sorts - risky I know, but these are trying times! Do you concur?
Quests.longDesc: Very well, bring our findings to Valoren - I have a feeling he will not be surprised that our attempt failed so miserably.. Yet, this disguise idea might prove effective.. I assume that the corrupted devotees cognitive functions must be at ease, no? We should take advantage.. The only thing we need is a credible disguise, which I bet Valoren can provide..

Quests.name: Purification Rites IV
Quests.shortDesc: I have your disguise ready, the disguise will only be effective for a certain amount of time, and not to mention that some enemies may see past it - so be careful! Are you ready to do your part of the deed?
Quests.longDesc: With this disguise you should be able to go unnoticed within the inner sanctums of Grimhold.. I advise you to seek out Flavio - Vizariel's mind may be broken, but I doubt he would be fooled by this disguise.. Question Flavio, he must know something that can bring about some measure of progress here..

Quests.name: Blood and Bone I
Quests.shortDesc: Ah yes! You have passed the initiation and you feel hungry for more.. I know the feeling! You are in luck my friend, for now comes the real challenge. Are you ready?
Quests.longDesc: To win your first arena battle is no easy feat, but we expect much from you. Gather some able fighters and prove yourself worthy!

objectives.objective: Win a match in the arena

Quests.name: Blood and Bone II
Quests.shortDesc: Your last feat was not bad at all, friend. Yet, let us raise the stakes even further! I dare you to defeat all benefactors multiple times, only then you will truly be worthy of a true champion's grace.
Quests.longDesc: Prove to us how strong you are, and perhaps we will raise the stakes even further - if you survive that is.

Quests.name: Purification Rites V
Quests.shortDesc: These are trying times, stranger.. I advice you to share your findings with Lord Vael..
Quests.longDesc: We must not lose hope, there is still time to turn the tables in our favor.. But be warned, Dreadwood has been in turmoil for a long time - I have only heard horror stories, and rumors of dead soldiers eating the flesh of their comrades..

Quests.name: Blood and Bone III
Quests.shortDesc: You have proven yourself in the arena, your glory shall not be forgotten! Thus we grant you the honor of challenging our revered leader, Sir Henry Bloodstone. Do you accept?
Quests.longDesc: Our revered leader is most eager to challenge you, his glory is unmatched... Feel free to gather able bodies, or go toe to toe..

Quests.name: Bloodstone Daily Challenge
Quests.shortDesc: You wish to challenge new foes? I challenge you to yet another game, friend!
Quests.longDesc: Our daily challenges never get tiring, we expect you to fight with ferocious might! Bring us glory!

objectives.objective: Win a match in the arena

Quests.name: Re-Stabilizing the Forge
Quests.shortDesc: I'm in need of additional crimson roses to stabilize my forge, do you have the time?
Quests.longDesc: My forge hungers, the magma is not easily stabilized, I appreciate your aid with this!

Quests.name: Exchange Avenger's Slicer
Quests.shortDesc: You have served us well, if you find Avenger's Slicer, let me enchant it for you.
Quests.longDesc: I will need a few minor ingredients to enchant the weapon, the molten essence you may find here in Scorchridge, ethereal dust can be salvaged from the ethereal guards in Grimhold.

Quests.name: Exchange Avenger's Claymore
Quests.shortDesc: You have served us well, if you find Avenger's Claymore, let me enchant it for you.
Quests.longDesc: I will need a few minor ingredients to enchant the weapon, the molten essence you may find here in Scorchridge, ethereal dust can be salvaged from the ethereal guards in Grimhold.

Items.name: Ring of Five
Items.desc: Once wielded by a great sorcerer...

Items.name: Commander's Highblade
Items.desc: A blessing from Lightfall itself...

Items.name: Heartbleed
Items.desc: The spikes hold the memories of their past victims...

Items.name: A brief introduction
Items.desc: Read me, if you dare...

Items.name: Mystics of the Wild
Items.desc: Heavy of knowledge, filled with secrets.

Items.name: Doomhammer
Items.desc: A deadly burden...

Items.name: Shield of Vengeance
Items.desc: Lightfall's reward for its bravest soldiers.

Items.name: Forsaken Helmet
Items.desc: The carrier may experience psychosis...

Items.name: Helm of Shadows
Items.desc: The mark of Keldroth has been engraved into its base.

Items.name: Wizard's Hat
Items.desc: But... I'm just Harry...

Items.name: Vial of Demonic Rat Blood
Items.desc: An essence of evil spires within...

Items.name: Rusty Key
Items.desc: Perhaps this key can be used to free Harold?

Items.name: Token of Dread
Items.desc: This item surges with dark magic...

Items.name: White Wolf
Items.desc: Spawns a rideable wolf.

Items.name: Grey Wolf
Items.desc: Spawns a rideable wolf.

Items.name: Brown Horse
Items.desc: Spawns a rideable horse.

Items.name: Icy Wolf
Items.desc: Spawns a rideable wolf.

Items.name: Steam Crossbow
Items.desc: Blessed by Van Helsing himself...

Items.name: Small Key
Items.desc: Should be able to fit into smaller cages...

Items.name: Urgent Notice
Items.desc: Blood surrounds the seal...

Items.name: Elixir of Berserking
Items.desc: If this isn't Ogre enough, then what is?

Items.name: Stoneshield Potion
Items.desc: A strong belly can defuse most situations, at least if you are an ogre!

Items.name: Soul Essence
Items.desc: A captured soul, you can feel its torment creeping up on you.

Items.name: Vizariel's Plea
Items.desc: For my dearest friend, Valoren.

Items.name: Filled Vial
Items.desc: Filled with water from Grimhold's holy spring.

Items.name: Vial of Holiness
Items.desc: Contains a sample of Grimhold's holy water.

Items.name: Token of Valor
Items.desc: A token of strength obtained in the infamous Bloodstone Arena.

Items.name: Grimhold Disguise
Items.desc: Allows the wearer to go unnoticed amongst the corrupted Grimhold devotees.

Items.name: Challenger's Blade
Items.desc: May be used to challenge Sir Henry Bloodstone himself.

Items.name: Inner Sanctum Key
Items.desc: May be used to unlock the doors leading to Grimhold's inner sanctum.

Items.name: Rodolth's Steroids
Items.desc: Made with love, by your pal, Rodolth.

Items.name: Choker of Servitude
Items.desc: Valoren's Holy Gift.

NPCs.name: Lord Rorin
NPCs.desc: An elected official of Lightfall who organizes the outskirts.

NPCs.name: Thor Heinberg
NPCs.desc: A local blacksmith and weapons crafter, master Heinberg.

NPCs.name: Lord Warren
NPCs.desc: A holy disciple from the Chantry.

NPCs.name: Slave
NPCs.desc: A slave, abused by the smugglers.

NPCs.name: Chef Pamsey
NPCs.desc: A local chef with surprising reputation.

NPCs.name: Commander Goran
NPCs.desc: A young talented warrior, whose ambitions outlast the empire.

NPCs.name: Lord Vael
NPCs.desc: A major consolidator from the Chantry.

NPCs.name: Sergeant Harold
NPCs.desc: Manages strategic operations throughout the land.

NPCs.name: Stable Master Allan
NPCs.desc: Handles the horses in the region.

NPCs.name: Dagon the Wise
NPCs.desc: A high ranking member of the Smuggler's Guild.

NPCs.name: Scout Trevor
NPCs.desc: A scout stationed at a major outpost.

NPCs.name: Vargulf Smolderstone
NPCs.desc: A great blacksmith utilizing a magma-infused forge.

NPCs.name: Gintharrias
NPCs.desc: A food vendor and gifted hunter.

Spells.name: Mortal Strike
Spells.desc: Strike your enemy with a deadly stab.

Spells.name: Crushing Blow
Spells.desc: Slam your foes with a powerful smash.

Spells.name: Arcane Blast
Spells.desc: Generates a blast dealing AOE damage.

Spells.name: Fireball
Spells.desc: Hurl a blazing bolt at your enemy.

Spells.name: Healing Circle
Spells.desc: Spawns a healing circle which will heal your allies!

Spells.name: Taunt
Spells.desc: Forces nearby enemies to attack you instead of your allies.

Spells.name: Shield Slam
Spells.desc: Strike your opponent with your shield, gaining extra threat in the act.

Spells.name: Shadow Circle
Spells.desc: Spawn a dark circle of shadows. Enemies will scream in agony.

Spells.name: Healing Touch
Spells.desc: Replenishes your or an allys health.

Spells.name: Blackhand
Spells.desc: Slam your enemy to the ground.

Spells.name: Fiery Arrow
Spells.desc: Ejects a fiery arrow towards your opponent.

Spells.name: Frostbolt
Spells.desc: Hurl a bolt of ice towards your enemy.

Spells.name: Healing Burst
Spells.desc: Heal everyone within a certain radius.

Spells.name: Impale
Spells.desc: Potentially knockdown your opponent.

Spells.name: Arcane Bolt
Spells.desc: Hurl an arcane infused bolt towards your enemy, explodes on impact.

Spells.name: Illumination
Spells.desc: Illuminate your surroundings, lasts until death, activate again to disable.

Spells.name: Fireblast
Spells.desc: An instant blast of fire.

Spells.name: Paralyze
Spells.desc: Slow down your opponent.

Spells.name: Piercing Shot
Spells.desc: Crushes through 100% of the opponents armor.

Spells.name: Explosive Shot
Spells.desc: Fires an explosive arrow towards your opponent.

Spells.name: Chain Lightning
Spells.desc: Releases a strong arcane charge which can jump across multiple targets.

Spells.name: Lightning Bolt
Spells.desc: Hurl a lightning charged bolt towards your enemy.

Spells.name: Thunder Strike
Spells.desc: Unleashes a thunderous strike at your opponent.

Spells.name: Savage Blow
Spells.desc: Unleashes all your might!

Spells.name: Polymorph: Chicken
Spells.desc: Morphs the target into a chicken.

Spells.name: Multi-Shot
Spells.desc: Fires a powerful shot that splits into multiple projectiles when hitting a valid target.

Factions.name: Lightfall
Factions.desc: Lightfall has been the centre of Arngor since the beginning of time. Powerful figures have risen and fallen.

Factions.name: The Chantry
Factions.desc: Their devotion for their holy lord has spread throughout Arngor. They try to see the best in people, and fight for justice, honor, and prosperity.

Factions.name: Shadow Council
Factions.desc: A vast group of powerful necromancers, empowered by the dark priestess herself. Together they have reigned havoc on Arngor, smiting down enemies of all races.

Factions.name: Smuggler's Guild
Factions.desc: A brotherhood of thieves, loyal to the highest bidder.

Factions.name: Bloodstone Syndicate
Factions.desc: A group of outlaws operating in Scorchridge, they also run the infamous Bloodstone Arena.

Factions.name: Ragefire Fortress
Factions.desc: Lead by Ragnar Ragefire, the brutish ogres of Scorchridge have found a peaceful retreat at this magnificent fortress overlooking the fiery depths of the great drylands.

Factions.name: Agents of Keldroth
Factions.desc: A secretive group of operatives loyal to Keldroth, the vile lord of pain & suffering.

Factions.name: Grimhold Exiles
Factions.desc: When Grimhold fell to the corruption of Keldroth's forces, Valoren rallied most of his regiment to escape and eventually return to reclaim their sacred sanctuary.
